data.description:
## What
The LLM runner sends no sampling temperature (`runner.py` model_settings carried only cache
flags, max_tokens, timeout), so every review call — including the Pass-2 finding VERIFIER — runs
at the provider default temperature with no seed. The verifier's narrow yes/no `binary` +
`severity_attributes` are the ONLY inputs to the kernel's `priority = validity x impact`, so
re-sampling them on an identical input flips impact/validity and therefore the block/advisory
decision. Proven from stored client sidecars: the same finding, same plan, no edits, scored
`impact 0.85 / priority 0.74 / BLOCK` on one run and `impact 0.0 / priority 0.0 / advisory` on
the next. Upstream review-code report §2.

## Approach
Add a `temperature` field to `LLMConfig` (default None = provider default, byte-unchanged; env
`REBAR_LLM_TEMPERATURE`). Apply it in the runner's `model_settings`, with a per-request
`RunRequest.config.temperature` override winning over the runner cfg (mirrors the existing
max_tokens seam). Add a per-step `with: temperature` input honored in `workflow/runs.py`
(the v3 step schema is closed; `with` is the open extension, exactly like `step_budget_per_item`).
Pin `temperature: 0` (greedy) on the Pass-2 verify steps: code-review.yaml verify, plan-review.yaml
BOTH verify-branch arms, and the hand-built plan-review Pass-2 novelty sub-call. This is a
REPRODUCIBILITY floor for gate integrity, not a correctness fix.

## Scope / files
- `src/rebar/llm/config.py` — `temperature` field + from_env + widen `_llm_float` default to
  `float | None`.
- `src/rebar/llm/runner.py` — apply temperature to model_settings.
- `src/rebar/llm/workflow/runs.py` — honor `with: temperature`.
- `src/rebar/llm/workflow/gates/code-review.yaml`, `plan-review.yaml` — `temperature: 0` on verify.
- `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/__init__.py` — greedy on the Pass-2 novelty sub-call.
- `tests/unit/test_llm_temperature.py` — new.

## Acceptance criteria
- `LLMConfig().temperature is None`; `REBAR_LLM_TEMPERATURE=0` -> 0.0; unparseable -> None.
- Runner omits `temperature` from model_settings when None (unchanged default); sets it when
  configured; a per-request config.temperature overrides the runner cfg.
- A workflow step with `with: {temperature: 0}` builds its RunRequest under cfg.temperature == 0.
- lint, typecheck, and the workflow/config/verify suites stay green.

## Out of scope
The single-pass completion-verifier gate (not four-pass Pass-2) is a natural sibling but left for a
follow-up. Correctness of narrow verification questions (a temperature-sweep robustness eval) is a
separate improvement.
data.title: Pass-2 verifier samples at provider-default temperature; re-runs flip block/advisory
